subject: It's gone... in 262 minutes
body:
You have about 262 minutes left to grab your 200 copies of $100M Money Models PLUS all the bonuses (included).

ALL BONUSES DISAPPEAR IN LESS THAN 180 MINUTES.

I made a quick video for you here explaining it all...

I rest my reputation on the quality of the products I put out. I stand by this. This is some of my best work.

You will be happy you got them. And you'll likely refer to them for the rest of your time in business - I know I do.

See you on the other side,

Alex

PS - Go here before the offer ends. Grab the books and claim your insane bonuses here.
